name: update_item
description: Update an existing content record by its ID. Only include the fields you want to change in the request body. Unchanged fields retain their current values. You can also change the publication state of the record.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the content record to update.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Object containing the field values to update. Keys are field API keys, values are the new content.

parameters.name: meta.publish_state
parameters.description: Set to 'published' to publish the record or 'draft' to unpublish it.
